name: YOUR "not so" RUDE WIFE
description:
𝙺𝚒𝚗𝚍 𝚘𝚏 𝚙𝚘𝚜𝚜𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚟𝚎, 𝚛𝚞𝚍𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚜𝚑. 𝙱𝚞𝚝... 𝚂𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙱𝙴𝚂𝚃 𝚠𝚒𝚏𝚎, 𝚒𝚏 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚑𝚘𝚠 𝚝𝚘 𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚕𝚎 𝚑𝚎𝚛. 𝚂𝚘, 𝚋𝚎 𝚊 𝚐𝚘𝚘𝚍 𝚑𝚞𝚜𝚋𝚊𝚗𝚍, 𝚊𝚗𝚍... 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝙶𝚘𝚍'𝚜 𝚜𝚊𝚔𝚎, 𝚓𝚞𝚜𝚝 𝚑𝚎𝚕𝚙 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚌𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚗 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚏𝚞𝚌𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚔𝚒𝚍𝚜' 𝚋𝚎𝚍𝚛𝚘𝚘𝚖, 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚢𝚊?

ART & OC By MeM (El_Memc)

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+/AGED UP

WIFE MATERIAL, WIFE MATERIAL, WIFE MATERIAL

Hey, boneheads. It's 3 in the morning as I write this, so I hope you're fast asleep and NOT jerking your meat... (like me. 💀)

Sooo... looks like we're back to MeM's OC bots!!! ("El Menem," to the homies). Every time this guy releases a new image of his OCs, I REALLY want to make him a bot.

It's not for nothing that my most viral bot (Oprah) uses the image of one of HIS OCs (although the characterization and such is completely original by me, nothing to do with his real OC, lmao).

In fact, I've made several other bots of his OCs privately, but since I didn't want to overuse his characters too quickly, I decided to give them a little break and focus on creating bots of OTHER characters, with images from OTHER artists.

But back to the beginning. Seeing as my first "girlfriend-type" bot was one of Melina, why not make a "wife-type" one now? I know there are people who like bots with this type of dynamic, so it seemed appropriate that with THIS one we return to the bots of MeM characters. ALTHOUGH, this bot isn't directly related to that other one. Think of this one as a mere "spiritual sequel," let's say.

It's worth noting that while it's implied, both in the context and in the initial text, that you and Melina have children, NOTHING is written specifically for them. No names, nothing. I mean, they don't even appear in the initial text, so I'm giving you carte blanche to write about them if you want.

Now, on to another topic... have you seen that new "Media Library" feature? Yeah? Well...

I mean, I guess it's... "cool"? So I can put my goofy-ass skeleton images back in the description and all, but... Come oooon!! I tried to upload one of the thumbnail images and it rejected it because it was "porn". NAH, NO SHIT!!!

Well, you know they want to remove the porn from the porn site.

I don't know why they're adding this feature if they probably know the creators would ONLY like to put the uncensored NSFW image in the description, but whatever.

At least I can put my skeleton images back.

Without anything else to say, enjoy, and...
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
